_comment: Runtime English bundle for BurnRate. Keys ARE the English source string. New keys go here first; the Chinese bundle inherits the same key set. See I18N_CONVENTIONS.md.
No Claude Code or Codex logs found in th: No Claude Code or Codex logs found in the default local log directories. Use either CLI at least once to generate logs.
Scanned {0} session files · no messages: Scanned {0} session files · no messages in range
Priced spikes: >${0} per turn · Unpriced: Priced spikes: >${0} per turn · Unpriced spikes: token-based (high token volume)
No pricing match — spike is token-based: No pricing match — spike is token-based
Hover a cell to see model breakdown.
Hover a cell to see tool breakdown.
Move over a square to inspect the exact: Move over a square to inspect the exact bucket.
Move over a square to inspect the exact date.
No model-level data in this bucket.
No tool-level data in this bucket.
{0} model unpriced and currently counted: {0} model unpriced and currently counted as $0.
{0} models unpriced and currently counte: {0} models unpriced and currently counted as $0.
Add pricing via customPricing, or ignore: Add pricing via customPricing, or ignore models you intentionally do not want in this warning.
No Codex quota snapshot found yet.
At current rate you'll hit the limit aro: At current rate you'll hit the limit around {0}
Current pace stays within this window.
Projection hidden until 3 active days of: Projection hidden until 3 active days of recent usage.
Projection is based on local Codex logs: Projection is based on local Codex logs and may undercount if older sessions were pruned or recorded on another machine.
{0} used in current window from local lo: {0} used in current window from local logs
Per active day from local logs: Per active day from local logs
At current local pace, the limit is proj: At current local pace, the limit is projected to be exhausted {0}.
Current local pace does not project an e: Current local pace does not project an exhaustion before the reset.
Need at least 3 active days in recent lo: Need at least 3 active days in recent local logs to project exhaustion.
No usage_limit_exceeded events in the cu: No usage_limit_exceeded events in the current window.
No Claude Code logs found. Switch to All: No Claude Code logs found. Switch to All Tools or Codex.
No Claude Code logs found in the default: No Claude Code logs found in the default local Claude log directory.
No Codex logs found. Switch to All Tools: No Codex logs found. Switch to All Tools or Claude Code.
No Codex logs found in the default local: No Codex logs found in the default local Codex log directory.
Codex has no recorded token usage yet. U: Codex has no recorded token usage yet. Use Codex, then refresh.
Codex has no data in this range. Try All: Codex has no data in this range. Try All Time or switch to All Tools.
Claude Code has no recorded assistant tu: Claude Code has no recorded assistant turns yet. Use Claude Code, then refresh.
Claude Code has no data in this range. T: Claude Code has no data in this range. Try All Time.
No assistant turns recorded yet. Use Cla: No assistant turns recorded yet. Use Claude Code or Codex, then refresh.
No usage data in this range. Try All Tim: No usage data in this range. Try All Time.
Claude Code does not expose subscription: Claude Code does not expose subscription quota in local logs, so BurnRate can only show implied API spend. Codex exposes it, so a Quota card is shown there.
These sessions are queued — pricing data: These sessions are queued — pricing data not yet available.
Set burnRate.monthlyBudget in settings t: Set burnRate.monthlyBudget in settings to track pacing.
Look at this batch's top-cost session.
Review which models drove burn that day.
